name: @questi0nm4rk/tagen
description: Skill-graph CLI — assemble Claude Code plugins from tagged catalog cards
author: Questi0nM4rk

scripts.build:npm:
bun build src/main.ts --target=bun --outfile bin/tagen.js && printf '#!/usr/bin/env bun
' | cat - bin/tagen.js > /tmp/tagen-tmp-$$.js && mv /tmp/tagen-tmp-$$.js bin/tagen.js && chmod +x bin/tagen.js
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run typecheck && bun test && bun run build:npm
